name: verify if Create API is able to create inwarranty jobs

testStage.description: Verify if FD is able to create job api and able to create inwarranty job

steps.name: Creating Inwarranty job with Create job api
Setting up the BASE URI and CONTENT TYPE AS Application/json and attaching the SensitiveDataFilter for a role and attaching payload
Getting the Property value from config file
Getting the auth Token for the role
